title: High-risk provider cohort
notes: Pre-registration record (v0.3.0). The composite combines four signals: OIG LEIE active exclusion match (1.5), NPPES match (1.0), NPPES deactivation (0.8), and Luhn validity (1.0). Buckets: critical (>=1.5, LEIE-excluded), high (>=1.0), medium (>=0.5). LEIE ingestion lives in analysis/ingest_oig_leie.py — pulls oig.hhs.gov/exclusions/downloadables/UPDATED.csv weekly. Numbers populate when both ingestion and analysis/high_risk_cohort.py run against the pinned NPD release. CSV export at /api/v1/findings/high-risk-cohort-export.csv capped at 10,000 rows by score. SAM.gov ingestion is the next roadmap signal (weight 1.5). Composite score is a data-quality flag aligned with 42 CFR § 455.436, NOT a fraud determination.
